Release Rust projects with ease

## Global Flags

| Flag | Short | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| `--config` | `-f` | Path to config file (overrides auto-detection) |
| `--verbose` | ‚Äî | Enable verbose output |
| `--debug` | ‚Äî | Enable debug output |
| `--quiet` | `-q` | Suppress non-error output |
| `--strict` | ‚Äî | Strict mode: configured features that silently skip become hard errors |


## Commands


### `anodizer release`

Run the full release pipeline


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--crate` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Release a specific crate (repeatable; --id is accepted as a GoReleaser-compat alias) |
| `--all` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Release all crates with unreleased changes |
| `--force` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Force release even without unreleased changes |
| `--snapshot` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Build without publishing (snapshot mode) |
| `--nightly` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Create a nightly release with date-based version |
| `--dry-run` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Run full pipeline without side effects |
| `--clean` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Remove dist directory before starting |
| `--skip` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Skip stages (comma-separated, e.g. docker,announce) |
| `--token` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | GitHub token (overrides ANODIZER_GITHUB_TOKEN / GITHUB_TOKEN env vars) |
| `--timeout` | ‚Äî | `60m` | Pipeline timeout duration (e.g., 60m, 1h, 5s) |
| `--parallelism` | `-p` | ‚Äî | Maximum number of parallel build jobs (default: number of CPUs) |
| `--auto-snapshot` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Automatically set --snapshot if the git repo is dirty |
| `--single-target` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Build only for the host target triple |
| `--targets` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Restrict the build to a comma-separated subset of configured target triples (e.g. x86_64-apple-darwin,aarch64-apple-darwin). Used by the Determinism Harness's sharded job matrix; conflicts with --single-target. |
| `--host-targets` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Build every configured target this host can build, skipping cross-compile-only targets (apple targets on a non-macOS host). Only valid with --snapshot or --dry-run. Used by `task prepush` to do a real host-scoped build without aborting on un-buildable targets. |
| `--release-notes` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Path to a custom release notes file (overrides changelog) |
| `--workspace` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Release a specific workspace in a monorepo config |
| `--preflight` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Run pre-flight publisher-state check and exit (don't start the pipeline) |
| `--no-preflight` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Skip the automatic pre-flight publisher-state check |
| `--strict-preflight` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Alias for --strict (also treats Unknown publisher state as a blocker during pre-flight) |
| `--draft` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Set the release as a draft |
| `--release-header` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Path to a file containing custom release header text |
| `--release-header-tmpl` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Path to a template file for release header (rendered with template variables) |
| `--release-footer` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Path to a file containing custom release footer text |
| `--release-footer-tmpl` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Path to a template file for release footer (rendered with template variables) |
| `--release-notes-tmpl` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Path to a template file for release notes (rendered with template variables, overrides --release-notes) |
| `--fail-fast` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Abort immediately on first error during publishing |
| `--no-gate-submitter` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Disable the Submitter gate: dispatch Submitter publishers even when required Assets/Manager publishers failed |
| `--rollback` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Rollback policy after publish stage. Defaults to best-effort when preflight is clean, none otherwise. |
| `--rollback-only` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Skip publish; re-attempt rollback from a prior run report. Requires --from-run=<id>. |
| `--from-run` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Prior run id whose state to load when running --rollback-only. Loads <dist>/run-<id>/rollback.json if present (a prior replay's state), otherwise <dist>/run-<id>/report.json. Delete rollback.json to force a full re-roll. Must match the run_id format written by the release pipeline (alphanumeric, dot, dash, underscore; no path separators). |
| `--allow-rerun` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | DANGEROUS: force publish to proceed even when a prior dist/run-<id>/report.json exists for this tag. PR-based publishers (homebrew, scoop, nix, krew, MCP) will open DUPLICATE pull requests. Recover from partial failures with --rollback-only --from-run=<id> first. Cannot be combined with --rollback-only (which has its own idempotency). |
| `--allow-nondeterministic` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Runtime non-determinism opt-out for a specific artifact (repeatable). Mutually exclusive with --strict. |
| `--summary-json` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Write the per-publisher run summary JSON to this path. |
| `--allow-ai-failure` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | If `changelog.ai` is configured and the AI provider fails, log a warning and keep the pre-AI release notes instead of aborting the release. |
| `--split` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Run only the build stage for split CI fan-out (outputs artifacts JSON to dist/) |
| `--merge` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Merge artifacts from split build jobs and resume the pipeline from post-build stages |
| `--publish-only` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Load artifacts from dist/ (preserved by `anodize check determinism --preserve-dist`) and run only the sign + publish pipeline. Skips build/archive/nfpm/sbom/checksum ‚Äî those stages' outputs must already be present in dist/. |
| `--prepare` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Run local build + archive + sign + checksum + sbom stages but skip release / publish / announce (GoReleaser Pro parity). Artifacts stay in dist/ for inspection. `--prepare-only` is accepted as an alias for GR-imported scripts. |
| `--announce-only` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Re-fire announcers only. Loads `<dist>/run-<id>/report.json` written by a prior run, skips every pipeline stage except announce (which itself short-circuits on nightly), then runs after-hooks. Use this to retry a transient announcer failure (Slack 502, Discord 5xx) without re-creating the GitHub release or re-publishing to package managers. Fails fast when no `<dist>/run-<id>/report.json` is present. |
| `--resume-release` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Resume into an existing release left over from a prior failed attempt; bypasses the safety check that bails on partial assets. |
| `--replace-existing` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Force release.replace_existing_artifacts: true regardless of config (overwrite conflicting assets on retry). |
| `--no-post-publish-poll` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Skip post-publish polling for chocolatey moderation / winget PR validation; report NotPolled for affected publishers. |


### `anodizer build`

Build binaries only (always runs in snapshot mode)


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--crate` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Build a specific crate (repeatable) |
| `--timeout` | ‚Äî | `60m` | Pipeline timeout duration (e.g., 60m, 1h, 5s) |
| `--parallelism` | `-p` | ‚Äî | Maximum number of parallel build jobs (default: number of CPUs) |
| `--single-target` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Build only for the host target triple |
| `--workspace` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Build a specific workspace in a monorepo config |
| `--output` | `-o` | ‚Äî | Copy the built binary to this path (requires --single-target and single crate) |
| `--skip` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Skip stages (comma-separated: pre-hooks, post-hooks, validate, before) |


### `anodizer check`

Validate configuration and run determinism checks


### `anodizer check config`

Validate the workspace's anodize config


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--workspace` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Validate a specific workspace in a monorepo config |


### `anodizer check determinism`

Run the determinism harness (build pipeline twice, diff artifacts)


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--runs` | ‚Äî | `2` | Number of from-clean rebuilds to diff |
| `--stages` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Optional stage subset (build,archive,sbom,sign,checksum,cargo-package,docker). `cargo-package` is harness-only ‚Äî drives `cargo package --no-verify --allow-dirty` per workspace member to probe `.crate` byte-stability without hitting a registry. `docker` is harness-only ‚Äî drives `docker buildx build --output=type=oci,rewrite-timestamp=true,dest=‚Ä¶` against `<repo>/Dockerfile` to probe OCI image byte-stability without pushing to a registry; skipped when `docker buildx` is unavailable or no Dockerfile exists. |
| `--targets` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Restrict the harness to a comma-separated subset of configured target triples. Used by the sharded release workflow so each runner only validates targets it can natively build (Linux runner skips macOS targets, etc.). Forwarded to the child `anodize release --snapshot` subprocess. |
| `--report` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | JSON report path; default dist/run-<id>/determinism.json |
| `--snapshot` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Force snapshot mode on the child release subprocess (artifacts get a `-SNAPSHOT-<sha>` suffix). Default: auto ‚Äî snapshot off when HEAD is at a tag, on otherwise. |
| `--no-snapshot` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Force snapshot mode OFF on the child release subprocess (artifacts emit the actual release version). Default: auto ‚Äî see --snapshot. |
| `--preserve-dist` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | When the harness greens, copy run-0's `<worktree>/dist/**` to <path> and emit `<path>/context.json` describing the artifact set. The release workflow's publish-only path consumes this to ship the determinism step's output directly (eliminates the redundant `build:` recompilation). Local operators can pass this too ‚Äî useful for inspecting a hermetic dist tree without re-running the release pipeline. |
| `--crate` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | When --preserve-dist is set, write the preserved dist tree to <dest>/<name>/ instead of directly into <dest>/. Used by the sharded matrix to produce per-crate subdirectories so a `release --publish-only` job can merge all crates into a single dist/ without context.json collision. |


### `anodizer check version-files`

Check that enrolled `version_files` still match each crate's current version


### `anodizer init`

Generate starter config, or enroll version-bearing files


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--version-files` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Discover repo files that embed the current version and enroll the selection into version_files in .anodizer.yaml |
| `--exclude` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Glob(s) to drop from discovered candidates (repeatable or comma-separated); only with --version-files |
| `--yes` | `-y` | ‚Äî | Non-interactive: enroll all discovered candidates without prompting |


### `anodizer changelog`

Generate changelog only


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--crate` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Generate changelog for a specific crate |
| `--from` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Start tag/ref for the commit range (default: latest matching tag) |
| `--to` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | End ref for the commit range (default: HEAD) |
| `--output` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Write the rendered changelog to this file (parent dirs auto-created); still echoes to stdout |
| `--snapshot` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Preview as a snapshot release (overrides changelog.snapshot) |


### `anodizer completion`

Generate shell completions


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `<shell>` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Shell to generate completions for |


### `anodizer healthcheck`

Check availability of required external tools


### `anodizer man`

Generate man pages to stdout


### `anodizer jsonschema`

Output JSON Schema for .anodizer.yaml


### `anodizer resolve-tag`

Resolve a git tag to its matching crate in the config


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `<tag>` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Tag to resolve (e.g. 'v1.2.3', 'core-v0.2.3') |
| `--json` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Output as JSON |


### `anodizer targets`

Emit the configured build targets as a GitHub Actions matrix


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--json` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Output as JSON (include-form matrix) |
| `--crate` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Restrict to specific crate(s) |


### `anodizer tag`

Auto-tag based on commit message directives


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--dry-run` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Show what tag would be created without pushing |
| `--custom-tag` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Override bump logic with a specific tag value |
| `--default-bump` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Override default bump type (patch/minor/major) |
| `--crate` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Tag a specific crate in a workspace |
| `--push` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Push the version-sync bump commit to the release branch atomically with the tag |
| `--no-push` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Push the tag only, leaving the version-sync bump commit local |
| `--push-remote` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Remote to push to (default: origin) |
| `--push-dry-run` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Create the tag + bump commit locally but only print (not run) the git push commands --push would use; pass --dry-run to also preview tagging |


### `anodizer tag rollback`

Rollback anodize-managed tags at a SHA, then revert (or reset past) the bump commit they point at


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `<sha>` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Commit SHA to roll back from. Defaults to HEAD. |
| `--dry-run` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Print what would happen without mutating anything |
| `--no-push` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Skip remote tag delete and branch push (local-only) |
| `--scope` | ‚Äî | `all` | Tag-shape filter: all | lockstep | per-crate |
| `--mode` | ‚Äî | `revert` | Rollback strategy: revert (default; history-preserving) | reset (opt-in; rewrites history, requires --force-with-lease to push) |
| `--branch` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Branch name to push the revert commit to. Required when HEAD is detached and no local branch points at it (typical CI tag-push context, where GITHUB_REF_NAME is the tag ‚Äî not the bump-commit branch). Pass --branch master (or whichever branch the bump commit was created on). |


### `anodizer continue`

Resume a release after a transient failure or after `--prepare`/`--split`


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--merge` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Merge artifacts from split build jobs and run post-build stages |
| `--dist` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Custom dist directory (overrides config) |
| `--dry-run` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Run full pipeline without side effects |
| `--skip` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Skip stages (comma-separated, e.g. docker,announce) |
| `--token` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | GitHub token (overrides ANODIZER_GITHUB_TOKEN / GITHUB_TOKEN env vars) |


### `anodizer publish`

Run only the publish stages (release, publish, blob) from a completed dist/


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--dry-run` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Run full pipeline without side effects |
| `--token` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | GitHub token (overrides ANODIZER_GITHUB_TOKEN / GITHUB_TOKEN env vars) |
| `--dist` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Custom dist directory (overrides config) |
| `--merge` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Merge artifacts from `release --split` workers (dist/<subdir>/context.json) before running the publish-only pipeline. Mirrors `goreleaser publish --merge`. |


### `anodizer bump`

Bump crate versions (Conventional Commits ‚Üí semver level)


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `<level_or_version>` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | patch | minor | major | <version> | release (omit to infer) |
| `--package` | `-p` | ‚Äî | Bump a specific crate (repeatable) |
| `--workspace` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Bump every workspace member (excluding publish=false) |
| `--exclude` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Exclude a crate from --workspace (repeatable) |
| `--pre` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Append a prerelease identifier (e.g. rc.1) |
| `--exact` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Do not rewrite dependents' [dependencies] version specs |
| `--allow-dirty` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Proceed even if the working tree has uncommitted changes |
| `--yes` | `-y` | ‚Äî | Skip confirmation prompt |
| `--dry-run` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Print the plan without editing any files |
| `--commit` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Stage edits and create a single commit |
| `--sign` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | GPG-sign the commit (requires --commit) |
| `--commit-message` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Override the default commit message template |
| `--output` | ‚Äî | `text` | Output format: text | json (json requires --dry-run) |


### `anodizer announce`

Run only the announce stage from a completed dist/


| Flag | Short | Default | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `--dry-run` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Run full pipeline without side effects |
| `--dist` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Custom dist directory (overrides config) |
| `--token` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | GitHub token (overrides ANODIZER_GITHUB_TOKEN / GITHUB_TOKEN env vars) |
| `--skip` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Skip stages (comma-separated) |
| `--merge` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Merge artifact lists from `release --split` workers (dist/<subdir>/context.json) before announcing. Mirrors `goreleaser announce --merge`. |
